title: helicteres geoffrayi
intro: Helicteres geoffrayi, also known as the Geoffray's stinkwood, is a plant species in the family Malpighiaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Helicteres geoffrayi include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The plant can be used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
